description_long: This is a tall, stone obelisk monument set on a broad, square, tiered base made of the same gray stone material. The obelisk itself is slender and tapers smoothly to a pointed tip, with each face featuring engraved inscriptions in a reddish hue. The base consists of two main levels, with the upper level supporting the obelisk and the lower level forming a wide platform. At the foot of the obelisk, there are wreaths or floral arrangements placed as tributes, adding a touch of color and indicating commemorative use. The stone surface is weathered, with visible stains and signs of age, giving the monument a solemn, historical appearance. The overall design is simple and dignified, with no elaborate ornamentation beyond the inscriptions and wreaths.
description: A tall, gray stone obelisk with engraved inscriptions stands on a wide, tiered square base, adorned with commemorative wreaths at its foot. The monument has a weathered, solemn appearance and is constructed from solid stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the obelisk's main face with clear inscriptions and a wreath placed centrally at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing another inscribed face and a wreath positioned to the left of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a less prominent inscription and a clear view of the tiered stone base without visible wreaths.
description_view_3: Angled view showing inscriptions, the tiered base, and a wreath placed to the right side.
attribute_inscription: Engraved inscriptions are present on all four faces of the obelisk, rendered in a reddish color. The text appears to be in a Latin alphabet, but the legibility is low due to weathering and image resolution.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible; the obelisk is plain except for the inscriptions.
attribute_base_design: The base is a two-tiered, square platform made of the same gray stone as the obelisk. The upper tier is smaller and supports the obelisk, while the lower tier is broad and flat, providing stability and a space for wreaths.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is sharply pointed and unadorned, with a smooth, clean finish matching the rest of the monument.
attribute_surrounding_features: Wreaths or floral arrangements are placed at the base, and the obelisk stands on a large, flat stone platform. No fences, statues, or additional features are visible.
